); } export default Doctors; const styles = { container: { fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif", minHeight: "100vh", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", backgroundColor: "#f4f6f9", }, searchContainer: { textAlign: "center", margin: "20px 0", }, searchInput: { width: "300px", padding: "10px", borderRadius: "5px", border: "1px solid #ccc", }, cardContainer: { flex: 1, display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", justifyContent: "center", gap: "20px", padding: "20px", }, card: { backgroundColor: "white", width: "220px", padding: "20px", borderRadius: "10px", textAlign: "center", boxShadow: "0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)", }, image: { width: "90px", height: "90px", borderRadius: "50%", marginBottom: "10px", }, button: { marginTop: "10px", padding: "8px 15px", backgroundColor: "#2c3e50", color: "white", border: "none", borderRadius: "5px", cursor: "pointer", }, };
